GM:(0,0,0)  H:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,1/2,0)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  H:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,1/2,0)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+  GM2-  GM3+  GM3-  GM4+  GM4-  GM5+  GM5-  GM6  GM8  GM7  GM9  GM10  GM11  H1+  H1-  H2+  H2-  H3+  H3-  H4+  H4-  H5+  H5-  H6  H8  H7  H9  H10  H11  N1+  N1-  N2+  N2-  N3+  N4+  N3-  N4-  N5  N6  P1  P2  P3  P5  P4  P6  P7  P8

2a (m3m1',m3m) A1g 1 1,2a (m3m1',m3m) A1u 1 1,2a (m3m1',m3m) A2g 1 1,2a (m3m1',m3m) A2u 1 1,2a (m3m1',m3m) Eg 2 1,2a (m3m1',m3m) Eu 2 1,2a (m3m1',m3m) T1g 3 1,2a (m3m1',m3m) T1u 3 1,2a (m3m1',m3m) T2g 3 1,2a (m3m1',m3m) T2u 3 1,2a (m3m1',m3m). Fu 4 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm) A1g 3 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm) A1u 3 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm) A2g 3 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm) A2u 3 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm) B1g 3 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm) B1u 3 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm) B2g 3 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm) B2u 3 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm) Eg 6 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm) Eu 6 1,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm). E1g 6 0,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm). E1u 6 0,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm). E2g 6 0,6b (4/mmm1',4/mmm). E2u 6 0,8c (3m1',3m) A1g 4 1,8c (3m1',3m) A1u 4 1,8c (3m1',3m) A2g 4 1,8c (3m1',3m) A2u 4 1,8c (3m1',3m) Eg 8 1,8c (3m1',3m) Eu 8 1,8c (3m1',3m) 1Eg2Eg 8 0,8c (3m1',3m) 1Eu2Eu 8 0,8c (3m1',3m) E1g 8 0,8c (3m1',3m) E1u 8 0,12d (42m1',42m) A1 6 1,12d (42m1',42m) A2 6 1,12d (42m1',42m) B1 6 1,12d (42m1',42m) B2 6 1,12d (42m1',42m) E1 2 0,12d (42m1',42m) E2 2 0
